page_content:
Formerly: GVPT729D.

GVPT708 Seminar in International Relations Theory (3 Credits)

An examination of the major approaches, concepts, and theories in the study of world politics with special emphasis on contemporary literature. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GVPT715 Applied Evaluation and Analysis of Government Policy (3 Credits)

The public policy approach at both state and federal levels; policy considerations and restrictions; methods of testing and evaluation; collecting and cleaning policy data.

Restriction: Must be in Applied Political Analytics (APAN); or permission of department.

GVPT718 Selected Topics in Political Science (3 Credits) Selected topics in the field of political science. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
